title: Tezahür | Manifestation | Arc 2: Eskişehir
author: BelleVeeFrozt
fandoms: "Choices: stories you play visual novel" "Original Turkish series"
summary: The sequel of Tezahür Arc 1: İstanbul.Meryem Can and Akın Şedim had to get their separate ways for good. One for the unforgettable team bonding road trip across Anatolia, and one for healing journey in Sakarya to overcome loss trauma.However, their shadow still following after them and soon, their life would never be the same.Note: This story only has plot crossover / mash-ups of variety Choices books, no presence of Choices characters inside.Suitable for aged 13 and aboveContains violence and fearContains scenes with unmoral behavior
